'''Gerney Caslo''' was one of [[Ruby Gulch]]'s water sellers on [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]] and the cousin of [[Booldrum Caslo]]. He fixed many water pumps the [[Theran]]s left to rot. He was shot when taking down cannon at [[Bleak Point Station]] in the aftermath of [[Bleak Point Invasion]].

{{Char-stub}}
